//: MuxPilot agent-state hooks for Codex CLI. Install to ~/.codex/hooks.json
//2: (Codex AUTO-DISCOVERS this path — there is no hooks_file key). Ensure
//3: [features] hooks = true in ~/.codex/config.toml (default on), then run
//4: /hooks INSIDE Codex to review and TRUST these entries — untrusted command
//5: hooks silently never fire. Codex sends the model slug on every event, so
//6: @pane_model is populated reliably. MUXPILOT_AGENT=codex tags the pane.
